keys.description: The user's preferred language identifiers in order of preference.
The current locale settings combining language, region, and formatting.
The interface style mode (e.g. 'Dark' for Dark Mode).
Specifies whether automatic capitalization is enabled.
Specifies whether smart dash substitution is enabled.
Specifies whether period substitution by double-pressing space is enabled.
Specifies whether smart quote substitution is enabled.
Specifies whether automatic spelling correction is enabled.
The preferred unit of measurement (Centimeters or Inches).
Specifies whether the metric system is preferred.
The preferred temperature scale (Celsius or Fahrenheit).
List of active keyboard input sources.
Action performed when double-clicking a window title bar (e.g., Minimize, Maximize).
A list of text replacement shortcuts defined by the user.
Determines the level of font smoothing (0 to disable, 8 for subpixel rendering).
